title: Charred Chewy Croatian Rhubarb Gallet
description: Romantic Croatian dish featuring forced-rhubarb, perfect for dessert. Forced rhubarb adds a sweet and tangy twist to the classic gallet.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, sugar, and baking powder.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the butter, eggs, milk, and salt.
Add the vanilla extract and mix well.
Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6mm).
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Transfer the dough circles to the prepared baking sheet, leaving 1 inch (2.5 cm) of space between each gallet.
Bake the gallet for 20-25 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Allow the gallet to cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
Arrange the chopped walnuts on top of the gallet and sprinkle with dark chocolate chips.
Return the gallet to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the chocolate has melted.
Allow the gallet to cool completely on a wire rack.
To char the gallet, place it under the broiler for 30-60 seconds or until the top is lightly browned.
